content.full_text:
Vote Yes on 5
CITIZENS UNITED TO END TAX LOOP-HOLES
6022 WILSHIRE BOULEVARD, LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA 90036 • (213) 936-6380 • (213) 936-5805

March 3, 1976

Ms. Nam Hambelton
Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K St.
Sacramento, CA. 95814

Dear Ms. Hambelton:

As per our telephone conversation
of 3 March 76, I am requesting an answer in writing to
the following question: Can an elected official, such as
a State Senator or Assemblyman, request directly from
a lobbyist financial support for a ballot measure campaign.

Your action will be important in
determining our future actions. Please respond as soon
as possible.

Thank You,

Marty Coren
Campaign Manager


State Cochairmen
SENATOR JOHN F. DUNLAP     ASSEMBLYMAN JOSEPH B. MONTOYA
Campaign Manager — MARTY COREN
